titleStmt.title: SII 16.219: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 219. (A.R. No. 608 of 1907.) NANDALŪRU, RAJAMPET TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the inner gōpura of the Saumyanāthasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1478, Naḷa, Pushya ba. 12, Monday, Makara-saṅkramaṇa corresponding to 1556 A.D., December 28.

It records a gift of wet lands in the villages Nelandalūru, Pāṭūru, Āḍupūru, Taṅgaṭūru, Poḷadalūru, Opili, Tāḷḷapāka, Guṇḍlūru and Ūṭukūru to god Chokkanātha, by Timmasāni, daughter of Jakkula Tippā-battuḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . niraṁttarāyō
stu . svastiśrī [.] vijayābhyuda
ya śālivāhana śakava(ru)
¨rṣaṁbulu 1478 Agu
nēṭi naḷasaṁvatsarapuṣya ba
huḷa dāpradaśī sōmavāraṁ maka Read dvādaśi .
ra saṁkramāṇapuṇyakāla(ṁ)
maṁdu śrīmadrajādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrīsadāśiva
dēvamahārāyalu vidyā
nagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanā
ruḍhuḍai prithivirājya pratipā
lanaṁ jēyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu nelaṁ
dalūri jakkula tippābattu
ni kūturu timasāniki cellē kṣē
traṁ sommu nelaṁdaluru pāṭu
ru Āḍupuru taṁgaṭūru po
ḷadalūru [O]pili tāḷlapāka
guṁḍlūru Ūṭukūru Ivito
mmidiŪḷlanu vaccinaṁ maḍikuṁṭalu 28
kuṁṭalunu dōśelapaḍiki tanaku
puṇyamugānu cokkanā
tha dēvuniki dhāravośi Isti
mi I puṇyānaku yavvarnu
tapagalavāraṁgāmu I
ṁdduku tapitēnu gaṁgakarutanu
gōvu jaṁpina pāpana bō
vuduru svadattā dviguṇa
ṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ .
(ṁ) paradattāpahārēṇa svada
ttaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . jakku
la tiṁmmasāni sēva . maṁgaḷama
hāśrīśrī jēyunūśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.219 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
